title: how to set up an openssh key in Debian
content: install ssh sudo apt install ssh -y how to generate ssh-keygen --helpssh-keygen -s rsa -b 4096 -f ~/.ssh/your keynamenvim ~/.ssh/config add: Host github.com HostName github.com IdentityFile ~/.ssh/git_wsl

title: How to backup your wsl
content: stop wsl wsl --shutdown backup wsl --export Debian D:\wsl\debian.tar unregister wsl --unregister Debian Recoverwsl --import Debian the folder path to put Debian your backup file path change the default user check the current user ls /home/ change user su user then sudo su change config cp /etc/wsl.conf /etc/wsl.conf.bkvim /etc/wsl.conf change the content [user]default=user reboot wsl --shutdownwsl

title: Set-up-wsl-from-zero

manpathexport MANPATH=/usr/local/man:$MANPATHexport MANPATH=/usr/share/man:$MANPATH Obsidiansudo apt install fontconfigsudo apt install fonts-firacodesudo apt install fonts-jetbrains-monosudo apt (.appimage)sudo ln -s /path/to/Obsidian-1.7.7.AppImage /usr/local/bin/obob Backup and Recover Wsl Backup wsl --shutdownwsl --export Debian D:\WSL\debian.tarwsl --unregister Debian recover wsl --import Debian D:\WSL\Debian D:\WSL\debain.tar in the wsl su usersudo sucp /etc/wsl.conf /etc/wsl.config.bk nvim /etc/wsl.conf add [user]default=user reboot DockerPreparationsudo apt updatesudo apt install -y apt-transport-https ca-certificates curl gnupg lsb-releasecurl -fsSL https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg# 官方源# $ curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg Software Configuration$ echo \ deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg] https://mirrors.aliyun.com/docker-ce/linux/ubuntu \ $(lsb_release -cs) stable | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list /dev/null# 官方源# $ echo \# deb [arch=amd64 signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/docker-archive-keyring.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \# $(lsb_release -cs) stable | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list /dev/null Finallysudo apt updatesudo apt install docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io

title: What is Docker
content: ContainerBefore we learning the docker, we have to know what is docker. In the development of applications, we need to transmit our appliciton between different collegue and different computer. However, in the different computer the environment is different, the application may go well on your computer, and go wrong on your collegues’. In order to solve the problem, someone choose to copy the whole operating system, but it will consume much more resource. So container arised at the historic moment, it packs up the application and its bin or lib together in the container, so that you are able to run application on different computer. DockerSo docker is accutually a project writed with GO programming language to achieve container technique. It just like a function in your mobile phone to create mirror of application in your phone.

title: set up a perfect powershell
content: insatll windows terminalI had already installed one. install font download here unzip right click one .ttf file and click install. insatll powershell core dowload [here](Releases · PowerShellPowerShell) install open it and : # 1. 安装 PSReadline 包，该插件可以让命令行很好用，类似 zshInstall-Module -Name PSReadLine -Scope CurrentUser# 2. 安装 posh-git 包，让你的 git 更好用Install-Module posh-git -Scope CurrentUser# 3. 安装 oh-my-posh 包，让你的命令行更酷炫、优雅Install-Module oh-my-posh -Scope CurrentUser config your powershell i don’t want to config too much.

title: how to sync different folder in git
content: 我利用hexo博客搭建了自己的个人博客，但是使用vscode总是感觉无法很好的管理整理自己的博客，这时候我想到了obsidian，我希望利用obsidian作为我的博客管理软件。但是我的博客obsidian已经利用git同步了。这时有两个办法 在obsidian的博客下建立一个hexoblog 在wsl下安装obsidian 利用git对两个文件夹进行同步。这里先介绍第三个版本可以让两个不同Git仓库中的一个文件夹保持同步。 一种常见的方法是使用 git subtree 或 git submodule 。不过 git subtree 相对来说更容易上手用于这种场景。 例如，假设你有仓库A和仓库B，想要同步仓库A中的 folder1 到仓库B中。 1. 在仓库B中添加仓库A作为一个远程仓库： git remote add repoA 仓库A的远程路径 2. 用 git subtree 拉取仓库A中的 folder1 ： git subtree add –prefix仓库B中的目标路径 repoA 分支名 –squash ，这里的 –squash 参数是把从远程仓库拉取的提交合并成一个，减少历史记录的混乱。 之后如果仓库A中的 folder1 有更新，在仓库B中同步更新可以使用： git subtree pull –prefix仓库B中的目标路径 repoA 分支名 –squash 。 另外，如果不想使用 git subtree 这种方式，也可以编写脚本，通过 git checkout 和 cp （复制文件）命令组合来手动实现从一个仓库的文件夹复制到另一个仓库的对应文件夹，但这种方式比较麻烦，并且容易出错。

title: the vim tutorial
content: 移动光标hjkl 工作流程 vim打开文件然后 然后i 进入编辑模式 编辑完成后：wq退出 常见功能一共有： 移动光标 编译文本 特殊命令

title: wsl移动系统镜像之后，还原系统之后重新挂载wsl
content: for some reason I move my wsl_debian to D disk, however I met some problem when reset my network and have to revert my system. And although my wsl_debian keep still, but system could not find it anymore. install and update wsl, then install a linux the same as your original linux. press + , and input regedit. find HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Lxss find BasePath, and change it to your original wsl_path.

title: A highly effective software capslock+ in the windows
content: 忽然发现存在一个极其高效的软件，结合输入法可以实现中英文混合输入编辑代码。但是快捷键工作量有一点大，特此记录过程。可能需要自己重写一次代码了，这个代码太混乱了。 首先为了便于传播应当借助vim的使用手册编辑。模仿给出快捷键。首先你应该写一个vim手册完全了解vim 问题如何在写代码时把中文符号转化为英文符号。同时不影响中文输入。 似乎不太现实 或者设置快捷键方便于快速切换中英文 或者设置快捷键切换方便切换中英文的标点符号。 或者自动转换识别中英文符号 如何进入vim的选中模式。 然后要考虑把功能分类。 有一个问题我的win按键无法使用。 首先我的按键习惯是CapsLock和Ctrl互换使用，因此要考虑是返回按键之后如何用CapsLock代替Ctrl。 还有如何集成listary到CapsLock+ 中 如何代替左右箭头按键，不不不左右箭头按键已经可以被替代了，无敌了这下。 能不能实现快捷键绑定功能呢？这样我就可以实现Ctrl enter功能了 还有如何实现输入法删除功能，避免双手的移动。实现了caps + w 和vim的差异 vim Caps+ 单一删除 x i 快捷键的思路 不需要使用快捷键储存，可以利用vim或者直接Ctrl 意料之外解决的问题 新的移动快捷键不需要重复退出移动光标了，便捷了中文编辑 习惯调整注意事项更换的快捷键会保留原来功能如果不自己绑定其他功能。 待解决问题 把qbar切换为listary：目前的问题在于发送快捷键。 如何尽量代替ctrl，ctrl挺好press 把短按Caps作为切换输入法 如何切换大小写 删除操作很难受，最好放在左右手 cap+q的快捷键浪费了 拖动窗口 中文打出英文符号 预计增加功能 数字小键盘 待学习网站0 配置开机自启动流程 转化可执行文件（放置在默认的地址，也就是ahk文件的位置） 利用计划启动管理器 设置注意事项 把启动时间设置为登陆之后（太早启动会导致出错） 在常规选项中选择以最高权限运行 同时在配置中切换为Windows10 在操作选项中的起始于地址设置为可执行文件的位置（否则不会加载自定义的内容）

title: how to backup your source code in the hexo
content: 由于hexo上传的总是编译后的静态文件，如果源文件丢失了就很尴尬了。所以备份源文件还是必要的。由于hexo-deploy插件不会创建.git文件，所以我们可以利用git进行备份。 git initgit checkout -b backupgit add remote origin your github pathgit add .git commit -m backupgit push --set-upstream origin backup 之后如果想进行备份直接 git add .git commit -m backupgit push

title: Install-texlive-in-the-wsl
content: Install-texlive-in-the-wsl我在这一篇文章会介绍一下三种在 windows 编辑 latex 的配置。可以根据自己的需要选择。 overleaf: latex 可以在这个网站实现在线编辑，而无需任何配置，但是由于是部署在国外的网站，在国内网络连接不够稳定，所以可能需要魔法。另一方面速度也会比较缓慢，而且没有那么灵活。如果官网里面的模板足够满足要求，这是一个非常好的选择。 windows 本地使用 vscode 编辑。vscode 是一个微软官方开发的文本编辑器，里面的插件非常丰富，几乎可以满足一切需求。不过这个方案可能有以下问题： windows 本地部署虽然有图形化界面，但是受限于 windows 环境变量的问题，以及复杂有些臃肿的系统，可能出现环境变量丢失或者其他难以排查的问题。 wsl + vscode：wsl(windows subsystem of Linux) 同样也是微软官方开发的工具（属于一种虚拟机，用来在 windows 的环境下模拟 Linux 系统，这几乎是 windows 下模拟 Linux 的最佳选择）。虽然是虚拟机可能性能不够好，但是 Latex 在 Linux 的环境下运行反而快很多。这个方案可能有以下问题： 需要一点计算机的常识。 安装 vscode-serve 的时候可能需要魔法（我第一次配置没有出现问题，之后重装系统结果配置的时候就出现了莫名的问题，无法解决，最后使用魔法就 OK 了） 默认安装在 C 盘，请先确认你的 C 盘剩余储存充足（最小化安装至少 4G）。 wsl+vscode在 Windows 环境下安装 Vscode点击这个 链接 进入官网进行下载。点击下一步下一步，不要改变任何选项（如果你不知道那些选项是什么意思），安装后然后重启就好了。 ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl_vscode.png]] ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl_vscode-1.png]] ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl_vscode-2.png]] 不知道安装界面会不会有什么不同，不过截止到 20241231 我的安装界面是这样的。 配置 Wsl 环境安装 Wsl 以管理员身份打开终端。 按下 win 键打开 windows 的搜索菜单，输入 powershell。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl.png]] 一般选择这一个就可以后面带 x86 选项也可以没什么问题。我是安装了其他版本才出现这么多选项。 右键点击，然后点击以管理员身份运行。 如果你使用的是最新的 windows 系统，复制粘贴下列的命令。如果不是请参考这个 官方文档 wsl --install -d Debian 如果执行成功就会出现这样的画面，然后可以输入你的用户名，相当于 windows 系统的用户名。然后再输入你想要的密码，然后再确认一遍，尽量简单，这不是开机密码，而是之后安装如果需要提高用户权限要输入的密码。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-2.png]] 接下来简单进行一下配置（第一次执行带 sudo 的命令会提示你输入先前设置的密码） sudo mv /etc/apt/sources.list /etc/apt/sources.list.backupsudo nano /etc/apt/sources.list 用方向键移动光标，把原来的内容删除，替换为下面的内容，然后使用 ctrl + x 退出，按 y 保存更改，再按 回车。 deb http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian-security bookworm-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src http://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian-security bookworm-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmware 再输入下面的命令 sudo apt update -ysudo apt install apt-transport-https ca-certificates 再次修改文件 sudo nano /etc/apt/sources.list 替换为 deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-updates main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian/ bookworm-backports main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian-security bookworm-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmwaredeb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian-security bookworm-security main contrib non-free non-free-firmware 在执行一遍 sudo apt update -y sudo apt upgrade -y ####（可选）更改 Debian 系统安装位置 默认安装在 C 盘，如果内存不足可以选择更改。 在安装后的界面输入 exit ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-4.png]] 根据注释替换后再逐行输入下面的命令： wsl --export Debian tar # 这个命令会备份你当前的 Linux 系统，然后压缩到一个 tar 文件，把tar 替换成你想要 tar 文件放置的路径，并且指定文件名。例如 wsl --export Debian D:\wsl\debian.tar 注意必须以 .tar 结尾。wsl --unregister Debianwsl --import Debian path tar # 把 path 替换为你想要安装 Linux 的文件路径。例如 wsl --import Debian D:\wsl D:\wsl\debian.tar ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-5.png]] 然后输入 wsl 启动。 第一次备份还原之后，不会登录原来设置的用户名。输入下面的代码，可以看到你之前设置的用户名。 ls /home/ ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-6.png]] su user # 把 user 替换为你设置的用户名sudo sucp /etc/wsl.conf /etc/wsl.conf.bknano /etc/wsl.conf 在跳出来的界面，使用方向键移动光标，粘贴下面的内容到最后面。 [user]default=user ![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-7.png]] 然后使用 ctrl + x 退出，按 y 保存更改，再按 enter。 然后关闭窗口重新打开 powershell（这次不需要以管理员身份运行），执行 wsl，就可以了。 配置 Texlive 环境 点击 这里 下载文件，这是清华大学维护的镜像网站，安全性有保障，而且带宽足够高。或者也可以在这个 官方网站 进行下载。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl_vscode-3.png]] 下载上面标黄的安装包即可。 在打开的 powershell 进入 wsl 之后输入下面的命令。 sudo mkdir /mnt/texlivesudo mount /mnt/iso /mnt/texlive # 把 iso 更改为下载的.iso 文件地址，比如C:\Users\Abel\Downloads\texlive.iso 然后会弹出一些警告，这不会对接下来的安装产生任何影响。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-8.png]] 再执行下面的命令： sudo /mnt/texlive/install-tl 接下来会进入安装的界面。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-9.png]] 在这一步可以自定义安装的组件，如果内存空间允许，建议直接按 i 然后 enter 进行安装 也可以按 c 进入自定义界面，可以像我一样配置，输入下面的命令然后回车 deghijkstuvwxyznoABCEHIKLMNS 确认这些字母前面的方括号里面没有叉号就可以按 r 回车，再按 i 回车，进行安装。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-10.png]] 然后在输入这样的命令 sudo umount /mnt/texlive	# 注意不是unmount!sudo rm -r /mnt/texlive 输入 sudo nano ~/.bashrc 把下面的内容放到结尾。同样 ctrl + x 退出，再按 y 确认修改，最后回车。 # TEX # Add TeX Live to the PATH, MANPATH, INFOPATHexport PATH=/usr/local/texlive/2024/bin/x86_64-linux:$PATHexport MANPATH=/usr/local/texlive/2024/texmf-dist/doc/man:$MANPATHexport INFOPATH=/usr/local/texlive/2024/texmf-dist/doc/info:$INFOPATH# complete the manpathexport MANPATH=/usr/local/man:$MANPATHexport MANPATH=/usr/share/man:$MANPATH# TEX 再执行下面的命令。 source ~/.bashrc 再执行 tex -v 如果出现这样的界面就说明安装成功了。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-11.png]] 最后 sudo cp /usr/local/texlive/2024/texmf-var/fonts/conf/texlive-fontconfig.conf /etc/fonts/conf.d/09-texlive.confsudo fc-cache -fsv Vscode 环境配置 在上一章节的 powershell 的 Linux 操作系统里面输入 code，就会自动下载文件。 完成之后，就会在 windows 下自动打开 vscode。![[install-texlive-in-the-wsl-12.png]] 至此我们的环境配置就彻底完成了。 结尾接下来我们可以直接在 windows 系统打开 vscode，然后使用 ctrl shift p ,然后输入 connect to wsl，回车就自动打开我们在 wsl 下配置的环境了。

title: list
content: list in the python list(): break into list temporaliy. index(): return the first position of a figure in a breakable varibles. count(): count the appear times of the figures. append(): add a terms at the end extend(): add the terms in the new list to the list pop(): remove the specific position terms, and return the removed term. remove(): remove the specific term in the list reverse(): as the name say sort(list, key len, reverse True): change the sort of list sorted(): the same as sort, but it doesn’t change the sort of the list and return sorted list

title: Have To Execute Hexo With Sudo
content: Have to execute hexo with sudoReasonhexo init``` is the reason.## Solution sudo chown -R azureuser:azureuser pathtohexofolderchmod -R u+rwX pathtohexofolder - change the /path/to/hexo/folder to that init executed. - remember do not ```sudo hexo init``` again.

title: A Official Manual of Hexo
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new My New Post More info: Writing Run server$ hexo server The operation will deploy hexo to the local host, you can see in [here]{http://localhost:4000} More info: Server Generate static files$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy It will deploy blog to a website.More info: Deployment

title: Fastgithub auto start
content: Fastgihub auto startSometimes, we could not access to github.com, and watt-toolkit is a very great tool, which is also named as steam++. However the software will make some trouble to git push to the github with ssh key. If you do not have other network accelerate demand, fastgithub is a good choice. InstallIf you are able to access to github.com, you may install in here.Vice versa, you could follow gitee(it wasn’t an official website), or search on the browser by yourself better. Auto start right click on the “this computer” and click on the manager.![[mmc_NUMzLOFEXb.png]] right click on the “tasks schedule library” in the “task schedule programme” in the “system tools”, then click “create tasks”![[mmc_hc8evz3XKX.png]] name “fastgithub” or any other name as you like.![[mmc_WToyVFymYB.png]] turn into the “trigger”, click on the “create”, then set as the picture. then turn into the “control”, click on the “create”, then choose the path where you install the fastgithub.exe![[mmc_ah7gDUFY7m.png]] in the “condition”, set the same as the picture.![[mmc_jtAlRQy98K.png]] in the “setting”, set the same as the picture.![[mmc_upPBLMuqe0.png]] finally click the “ensure” one by one. When the system ask for password, input the password of you computer, instead of pin.

title: How to uninstall snap
content: uninstall snap 缓存 for p in $(snap list | awk print $1); do sudo snap remove $pdone if output like this, repeat the operation snap Name is not installedcore20 removedsnapd removed if output like this, go forward: No snaps are installed yet. Try snap install hello-world. uninstall core sudo systemctl stop snapdsudo systemctl disable --now snapd.socketfor m in /snap/core/*; do sudo umount $mdone then sudo apt autoremove --purge snapd then rm -rf ~/snapsudo rm -rf /snapsudo rm -rf /var/snapsudo rm -rf /var/lib/snapdsudo rm -rf /var/cache/snapd finally sudo nano /etc/apt/preferences.d/nosnap.pref add the following content: Package: snapdPin: release a=*Pin-Priority: -10 something wrong in ubuntu22.04 something wrong like this: $ sudo snap remove --purge firefoxerror: cannot perform the following tasks:- Remove data for snap firefox (1943) (unlinkat /var/snap/firefox/common/host-hunspell/en_ZA.dic: read-only file system) 首先验证使用以下命令验证varsnapfirefoxcommonhost hunspell是否确实挂载在ext4文件系统 lsblk-fe7-o+ro if so sudo systemctl stop var-snap-firefox-common-host\\x2dhunspell.mountsudo systemctl disable var-snap-firefox-common-host\\x2dhunspell.mount Removed /etc/systemd/system/default.target.wants/var-snap-firefox-common-host\x2dhunspell.mount.Removed /etc/systemd/system/multi-user.target.wants/var-snap-firefox-common-host\x2dhunspell.mount.

title: how to shortcuts of windows termianl
content: install and set hotkeys turn on a windows termianl open tasks manager click on the terminal to unfold the programme right click on programme with the correct picture, open the path of the file find “wt.exe” and create a shortcuts of it right click on the shorcuts, open the attributes. set hotkey and click yes better work with autohotkeywhen we press hotkeys, no matter whether there is a running termianl, system always open a new terminal. To solve this, we can use autohokey install create a script and name as terminal_open.ahk change the content #SingleInstance force; 假设你的终端快捷键是Ctrl + Alt + T，你可以修改下面的热键^!t:: WinGet, count, Count, ahk_class ConsoleWindowClass if (count = 0) ; 这里需要替换为你实际打开终端的命令，例如对于Windows Terminal是wt.exe Run, wt.exe else WinActivate, ahk_class ConsoleWindowClass return set the script start with system, the same as before. if it didn’t work, it probably because of the ahk_class was different. We could use a script named window spy to find the correct ahk_class

title: install zsh and oh-my-zsh in Debian
content: updatesudo apt updatesudo apt install zsh change shell to zshchsh -s /bin/zsh install oh-my-zshsh -c $(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh) if you meet some ceritifice problem git config --global http.sslVerify false then do the commond again input “y” to set shell to zsh change themevim ~/.zshrc you may change the theme in the ZSH_THEME”theme_you_like” install plugins zsh-syyntax-highlighting zsh-autosuggestions install git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting.git $ZSH_CUSTOM:-~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlightinggit clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions $ZSH_CUSTOM:-~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions config vim ~/.zshrc add zsh-syntax-highlighting zsh-autosuggestions in the plugins() reload source ~/.zshrc

title: how to personalize the shortcut of the software
content: we can use the plugins of the xournal++^[https://blog.csdn.net/qq_41776453/article/details/128764167]. enter the path Xournal++sharexournalpppluginsExample. if you like change the plugin.lua [about]## Author / Copyright noticeauthor=xxxxx# 插件描述description=This is a minimal example plugin, for reference## If the plugin is packed with Xournal++, use## xournalpp then it gets the same version numberversion=0.1#这个是配置插件的开关，记得设为true就行[default]enabled=true# 插件函数的主入口，lua的集成方式，性能很好！=_=[plugin]mainfile=main.lua change the main.lua -- This is an example Xournal++ Plugin - copy this to get startedvar_dump = require var_dump-- Register all Toolbar actions and intialize all UI stufffunction initUi() -- print(Hello from Example: Plugin initUi called ); -- ref = app.registerUi([menu] = Tests123, [callback] = exampleCallback, [accelerator] = Controlt); -- app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_LINE_STYLE_DASH) -- print(Menu reference:); -- var_dump(ref); -- print(Example plugin registered ); app.registerUi([menu] = Black Pen, [callback] = black_pen, [accelerator] = d); app.registerUi([menu] = Blue Pen, [callback] = blue_pen, [accelerator] = f); app.registerUi([menu] = Red Pen, [callback] = red_pen, [accelerator] = w); app.registerUi([menu] = Green Pen, [callback] = green_pen, [accelerator] = r); app.registerUi([menu] = Eraser, [callback] = eraser, [accelerator] = e); app.registerUi([menu] = Select Region, [callback] = select_region, [accelerator] = a); app.registerUi([menu] = Hand, [callback] = hand, [accelerator] = s);end-- Callback if the menu item is executedfunction exampleCallback() result = app.msgbox(Test123, [1] = Yes, [2] = No); print(result = .. result)endfunction black_pen() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_PEN) app.changeToolColor([color] = 000000, [tool] = pen)endfunction blue_pen() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_PEN) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0x3333CC, [tool] = pen)endfunction red_pen() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_PEN) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0xEF0044, [tool] = pen)endfunction green_pen() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_PEN) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0x008000, [tool] = pen)endfunction orange_pen() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_PEN) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0xEF7000, [tool] = pen)end-- Highlighterfunction blue_highlighter() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_HIGHLIGHTER) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0x20D0FF, [tool] = highlighter)endfunction red_highlighter() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_HIGHLIGHTER) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0xFF55FF, [tool] = highlighter)endfunction green_highlighter() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_HIGHLIGHTER) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0x00FF00, [tool] = highlighter)endfunction yellow_highlighter() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_HIGHLIGHTER) app.changeToolColor([color] = 0xEEFF00, [tool] = highlighter)end--other functionfunction undo() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_UNDO)endfunction eraser() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_ERASER)endfunction select_region() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_SELECT_REGION)endfunction hand() app.uiAction([action] = ACTION_TOOL_HAND)end attention you can not use number as shorcut because xournal has setted. if you want add other function, you may change the language to english and then you could know what the tool’s name in english
